title: loop-complete
description: Written by the worker to report loop execution results. Read by the main thread to update planning state and advance to the next loop.

loop_name.description: Globally unique loop identifier, e.g. ralph-loop-001

loop_file.description: Relative path to the loop file from project root

status.description: completed = all todos done; partial = some cancelled/failed; failed = hit max_iterations

todos_done.description: Number of todos with status completed

todos_failed.description: Number of todos with status cancelled

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the worker finished

done.description: What was completed — one sentence max

failed.description: What failed and why — one sentence max; empty string if nothing failed

needed.description: What must still happen — one sentence max; empty string if fully done

handoff.description: Handoff summary from this loop, to be injected into the next loop's context

duration_seconds.description: Elapsed time from worker start to completion (optional, for metrics)
